audit_items.proof_trace: The add_delta wrapper in thread.c has no heap allocations; do_add_delta in memcached.c frees `it` (do_item_get) on every early-return path via do_item_remove, and frees `new_it` (do_item_alloc) via do_item_remove before fall-through. In complete_incr_bin (proto_bin.c:319-335), item_alloc allocates `it` and item_remove(it) at line 335 is positioned after the store_item if/else block but within the `if (it != NULL)` guard, correctly releasing the allocation on both success and failure paths.
